action_set_definitions.name: get_restaurant_config
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves environmental constraints including the maximum total guest capacity limit (fire code/occupancy limit).

action_set_definitions.name: list_reservations
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves all confirmed reservations for a specific time slot, including customer names, party sizes, and assigned table IDs.

time_slot.description: The time to check, formatted as HH:MM.

action_set_definitions.name: list_table_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the list of all tables in the restaurant, their physical seating capacity, and their current base status.

action_set_definitions.name: add_reservation
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a new reservation entry in the internal database and assigns it to a specific table.

state_description.tables: A list of table objects containing 'table_id' (int), 'capacity' (int), and 'status' (string: 'available', 'occupied', 'reserved').
state_description.current_time: The current wall-clock time in the simulation (HH:MM format).
state_description.restaurant_capacity_limit: Total number of guests allowed in the restaurant simultaneously due to fire codes.
state_description.waitlist: A queue of customers waiting for a table when none are available.
